headline: Spotify vs Netflix: One Growth Stock Has an Edge
summary: Spotify (NYSE:SPOT) and Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) both reported Q1 2026 earnings that sent each stock lower, but for very different reasons. Spotify beat on profit and kept stacking subscribers. Netflix posted a headline-friendly cash flow number that was mostly a one-time check from a deal it walked away from. Two subscription giants. Two very different stories ... Spotify vs Netflix: One Growth Stock Has an Edge

headline: Citizens Maintain a Market Perform Rating on Netflix (NFLX)
summary: Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) is one of the Stocks That Will Make You Rich Over the Next 3 Years. Recently, on June 23, Bernstein maintained a Buy rating on Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) with a price target of $110. Earlier on June 18, Citizens reiterated a Market Perform rating on the stock without disclosing any price targets. […]
